title: Simple QoL Commands
description: A Spigot/Paper plugin that adds simple but handy commands.
body:
![Simple QoL (quality-of-life) Commands logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5860a657313918733acba33242cda43c10704828_0.webp)

**Simple QoL Commands** is a Spigot plugin that adds simple, but handy commands. Currently, the plugin features 10 commands.

<details>
<summary>Commands</summary>
  
- "/spawn":\
  Usage: /spawn\
  Teleports the executor to the world spawn.

- "/tpa":\
  Usage:  /tpa <accept|decline|cancel> <username>\
          /tpa <username>\
  Sends a teleport request to another player.

- "/home":\
  Usage: /home <tp/set> <number>\
  Sets a home point that you can teleport to at any time.  

- "/back":  
Usage: /back  
Teleports the executor to the place where they last teleported, or to their last death location (only if _enable-back-command-on-death_ was set to _true_).  

- "/warp":  
  Usage: /warp <warp_name/create/remove>  
  Similar to _/home_, but is managed by the server's admins.  

- "/fly":  
  Usage: /fly <player>  
  Enables flying for yourself or a specific player (if you have OP).

- "/nightvision":  
  Usage: /nightvision OR /nv  
  Grant night vision to yourself.  

- "/stack":  
  Usage: /stack <item>  
  Stacks the same item from your inventory to your main hand.  

- "/hat":  
  Usage: /hat
  Swaps an item in your main hand with your helmet slot.  

- "/trash":  
  Usage: /trash  
  Opens a double-chest GUI accessible to all players. When you put items in it, all players can see and take them, kinda like a double ender-chest, but it works for anyone. After about 1.5 minutes, all the items in the trash bin will be cleared.
</details>



If you find any bugs, please DM me on Discord.    
@gd_duong  

_I'm currently developing a fabric server-side version. Will be out soon!_
